title: Rashallo
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Rashallo''' was a plant that grew on [[Haruun Kal/Legends|Haruun Kal]]. Its green leaves were used to roll [[Cigarra/Legends|cigarras]].

==Appearances==
*[[Shatterpoint (novel)|''Shatterpoint'']] {{Ab|Shatterpoint (unabridged audiobook)}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
